message:
fix(index,fsfs): harden FSVI/WAL parsers against overflow and fix silent error discards

FSVI: replace unchecked arithmetic on untrusted record_count/offset values
with checked_mul/checked_add chains returning SearchError::IndexCorrupted,
preventing silent wrap-around in release builds from malicious index files.

WAL: clamp Vec::with_capacity to data-bounded maximum, preventing OOM from
crafted entry_count values; add checked_add for cursor arithmetic.

Runtime: replace `let _ = soft_delete().ok()` with tracing::debug logging
so unexpected errors are visible in diagnostics.

Format emitter: remove fabricated per-phase latency breakdown (quality_ms
was always hardcoded to 0); show only total duration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
